PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christina Gallagher appeared via zoom for Brad Smith (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the death of the executor, that primary beneficiary HIrokazu Shinohara passed away, and that Mr. Shinohara had all his assets in his trust and that no Probate has been opened. The Court order was not complied with to make distribution. The Court ordered bond to be set at $133,000.00. Matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Aquino. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Continued To Jun-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mara Mahana, via Zoom, for Patricia Hill, Personal Representative.

Ms. Mahana reports of delays caused by pending payments regarding a parking space and a tax refund which have recently been received and now expects to file a petition for final distribution, shortly. The court confirms with counsel that obtaining waivers is likely.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jun-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Jun-08-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Continued To Mar-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that notice is proper. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 31, 2013 is admitted to probate. Patricia A. Hill is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 8, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
